Tidepool cluster at golden hour, sea stars clinging to rocks, hermit crabs scuttling between anemones.
Weathered dock pilings at dawn, crusted with barnacles, gentle waves lapping against salt-darkened wood.
Sandy cove sheltered by chalk cliffs, distant lighthouse beam sweeping across evening tide.
Mangrove roots at waterline, filtered sunlight dancing through twisted branches and brackish pools.
Rocky shoreline at sunset, amber light catching sea spray on jagged basalt formations.
Abandoned rowboat half-sunk in shallows, wildflowers blooming through weathered planks and peeling paint.
Sea cave entrance at low tide, wet sand gleaming, shallow pools reflecting stone ceiling.
Coral sand beach with leaning coconut palms, turquoise shallows lapping at scattered conch shells.
Fog-shrouded pier at twilight, rusted lanterns swaying, coiled rope draped over splitting boards.
River mouth where fresh water meets salt, currents swirling from murky brown to crystalline.
Tidepool cluster at midday, purple urchins nestled between rocks, tiny translucent shrimp darting.
Crumbling stone jetty at midnight, moon-silvered waves breaking against moss-covered blocks.
Pebble beach at dawn, smooth stones still wet from receding tide, seaweed strands glistening.
Salt marsh at dusk, cordgrass rustling, shallow channels reflecting violet-orange sky.
Volcanic rock pools at noon, black stone heated by sun, trapped fish circling slowly.

Driftwood scattered across gray sand beach, storm clouds gathering, first raindrops dimpling shallow waves.
Concrete seawall at golden hour, graffiti-covered, foam splashing up worn steps leading nowhere.
Barrier island sandspit at sunrise, oysterbeds exposed, egret tracks leading to water's edge.
Limestone shelf at high tide, waves surging through natural archway, sea glass tumbling.
Abandoned fishing net draped over rocks at sunset, plastic floats bleached pale, mussels colonizing mesh.
Brackish lagoon separated from ocean by sandbar, still water reflecting palm fronds and clouds.
Granite boulders at moonrise, tide rushing between stones, phosphorescent plankton glowing in foam.
Rusted anchor chain disappearing into sand at low tide, barnacles crusting every link.
Mudflat estuary at dawn, fiddler crab holes pocking surface, distant buoy bell clanging.
